title: Algebra P2: Extend hex readme validate to check ports-signature.md covers every trait
rationale: Phase 2 of ADR-2604111229 — add a CI gate that every pub trait I*Port in hex-core/src/ports/*.rs appears as a section in docs/algebra/ports-signature.md. Prevents the algebra doc from silently drifting when a new port is added. Mirrors the pattern already used for README count validation.

steps.description: Add a check_ports_signature_coverage() function to hex-cli/src/commands/readme.rs::validate_readme. Scan hex-core/src/ports/*.rs for `pub trait I*Port` names, scan docs/algebra/ports-signature.md for section headers like `## IFileSystemPort` or `### IFileSystemPort`, report err for any trait not covered and any section with no corresponding trait.
steps.done_condition: Function exists and is called from validate_readme; it returns err entries for missing coverage in either direction

steps.description: Add unit tests for check_ports_signature_coverage: (a) all covered → ok, (b) trait missing from doc → err, (c) doc section with no matching trait → err, (d) signature file missing entirely → warn, not err (so phase 1 can land before phase 2 wires it).
steps.done_condition: cargo test -p hex-cli --lib commands::readme passes with 4+ new tests

steps.description: Run hex readme validate against the real repo. Confirms the phase-1 ports-signature.md covers all 10 traits with 0 new errors. Document the check in docs/analysis/README-drift-baseline.md under a new 'Ports signature coverage' subsection.
steps.done_condition: hex readme validate --strict reports 0 errors with the new check active; drift report updated

steps.description: Mark ADR-2604111229 phase P2 as Done. Update CLAUDE.md's Task Tier Routing section (if needed) to mention that adding a new port requires updating ports-signature.md — this closes the loop for humans as well.
steps.done_condition: ADR table P2 row reads Done with validation gate reference; CLAUDE.md has the hint

successCriteria: hex readme validate catches any new port added without updating ports-signature.md
hex readme validate catches any section in ports-signature.md with no corresponding trait (stale doc section)
4+ new unit tests covering the coverage check

riskRegister.risk: Section-header regex is fragile — the doc might use ## or ### headers, or backtick-quoted trait names
riskRegister.mitigation: Use a permissive scanner that accepts either header level and both backtick-quoted and plain trait names; lock the expected format in a unit test

riskRegister.risk: Phase 1 lands without phase 2 and someone adds a new port before phase 2 is implemented
riskRegister.mitigation: Phase 2 is small (<200 lines) and should ship within days of phase 1. Missing coverage is a warn (not err) at first to avoid blocking unrelated PRs during the window
